## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Why This Change

Explain the motivation and context.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI or tooling change
- [ ] Security fix

## Validation

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v`
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall -q theme_manager`
- [ ] Manual verification completed (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the project coding style and structure
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed
- [ ] I considered compatibility impacts (desktop, distro, package manager)
- [ ] I considered security impacts

## Screenshots or Logs (if applicable)

Add screenshots, terminal output, or logs that help reviewers.

## Related Issues

Link related issues, for example: `Closes #123`
